new_products.trending_reason: Red light therapy masks are the #1 growth subcategory in TikTok Shop's Facial Beauty Device category, up 400% YoY per TheIndustry.beauty (Feb 2026). HIME SAMA has 230,000+ influencer users and a dedicated TikTok Shop storefront. 26% of purchases happen via LIVE Shopping. Concern-led skincare search behavior (#skintok, #acne, #antiaging) drives sustained algorithmic discovery. 7-color masks address acne, wrinkles, and pigmentation — broad appeal across skin concerns.
